column3: An MFD can combine printing, scanning, faxing, network, phone-line, and web-printing functions.
column4:
Why

The acronym appears often in deployment discussions for all-in-one office devices.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.41; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.7
column9: A+::220-1201::3.7 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::MultifunctionDevicesandPrinters Cloze Printer MFD Source::Messer-v170

column3: PCL is one of the page description languages listed for Objective 3.7.
column4:
Distinction

Driver-language matching is tested with Basic cards; this Cloze card is only acronym recall.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.41; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.7
column9: A+::220-1201::3.7 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::MultifunctionDevicesandPrinters Cloze HighYield Printer PCL Source::Messer-v170

column2: Duplex printing means printing on {{c1::both sides of the page}}.
column3: The printer must support duplexing for the setting to work automatically.
column4:
Distinction

Duplex is different from orientation, tray selection, and quality settings.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.42; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.7
column9: A+::220-1201::3.7 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::MultifunctionDevicesandPrinters Cloze Printer Duplex Source::Messer-v170

column3: In Objective 3.7, SMB appears as a destination option for scan-to-folder workflows.
column4:
Why

SMB is the file-sharing protocol commonly associated with Microsoft network shares.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.42; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.7
column9: A+::220-1201::3.7 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::MultifunctionDevicesandPrinters Cloze Printer SMB Source::Messer-v170

column3: An ADF feeds multiple pages through a scanner.
column4:
Distinction

Use a flatbed scanner when the original should lie flat instead of being fed through the device.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.42; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.7
